detaileddescription.para:
This function creates and initializes a VsCamDevice instance. VsiCamDeviceCreate !include E01_External/VsiCamDeviceCreate.plantuml
pCamConfig
Instance configuration.
phCamDevice
Handle to the VsCamDevice instance. } CamDeviceInstanceIdMapping, CamDeviceHalHolderCreate, CamDeviceSensorInit, CamDevicePlatformInit, CamDeviceBufCtrlInit, CamDevicePipeInit, CamDeviceEngineInit, CamDeviceSubModuleInit }
